recommendations.title: A Wonderful World
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale about the political and socioeconomic realities of Mexico.

recommendations.title: ¡Que viva México!
recommendations.overview: After his grandfather's death, a man travels with his wife and kids to his hometown, where chaos ensues with his relatives over the inheritance.

recommendations.title: Herod's Law
recommendations.overview: In the 1940s, a small Mexican town has seen its last three mayors assassinated in rapid succession. A naive janitor is recruited to become the new mayor, and he believes he will modernize the little town and usher in a reign of peace. But the system

recommendations.title: Hell or High Water
recommendations.overview: A divorced dad and his ex-con brother resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family's farm in West Texas.

recommendations.title: Bad Boys for Life
recommendations.overview: Marcus and Mike are forced to confront new threats, career changes, and midlife crises as they join the newly created elite team AMMO of the Miami police department to take down the ruthless Armando Armas, the vicious leader of a Miami drug cartel.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Dictatorship
recommendations.overview: TV MX, the most powerful Mexican Television Corporation, discloses a scandalous story involving Governor Carmelo Vargas in serious crimes and illicit business. Governor Vargas worried about his political future, decides to clean his image and negotia

recommendations.title: The Young and the Damned
recommendations.overview: A group of juvenile delinquents live a violent life in the infamous slums of Mexico City; among them Pedro, whose morality is gradually corrupted and destroyed by the others.

recommendations.title: The Dressmaker
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Australia, beautiful, talented dressmaker Tilly returns to her tiny hometown to right wrongs from her past. As she tries to reconcile with her mother, she starts to fall in love while transforming the fashion of the town.

recommendations.title: American Made
recommendations.overview: The true story of pilot Barry Seal, who transported contraband for the CIA and the Medellin cartel in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Brazilian Western
recommendations.overview: When João goes to Brazil in search of a better life, he meets punk music enthusiast Maria and falls in love with her. But his involvement in the local drug trade makes him the target of a vicious drug lord.
